title: Pack of 6 Sandwich Platter Trays with lids - Reusable Plastic Catering Trays with Lids for Meal Prep, Cakes, Treats and Sandwiches (33.5cm x 24cm x 6cm)
features: MULTIPLE USAGE: These Buffet Trays With Lids are the perfect way to present and transport Sandwiches, Cakes, Pastries, or any sweet treats. These domed plastic trays keep the prepared party foods fresh, safe and neatly stacked in the fridge until party time

PACK SIZE: These platters for party food set comes with 6 trays & 6 lids, the dimensions of these sandwich trays with lids are 33.5cm x 24cm x 6cm, making them perfect for big occasions such as Banquets, Weddings, Engagements, Birthdays, Baby Showers, Parties, Catering and Home Cooking

EASY to USE: Place your sweet or savoury treats onto serving party platter, the clear Lids will help to distinguish which food are in which Tray, while keeping them safe from being damaged and protected from flies or nasty insects spoiling your food when outdoors

FOOD GRADE PLASTIC: These Sandwich Trays With Lids are Reusable. These food trays are made of BPA Free Plastic making them durable enough to reuse, while making great elegant food trays for serving party
WASHABLE: You can easily wash these party food trays, sandwich platters or buffet platters in warm soapy water and reused it multiple times

specifications_table.Recommended uses for product: ‎Cake, Catering, Crackers, Dry Foods, Fruit, Pastry, Vegetables, sandwiches
